layers.name: Source evidence
layers.description: PRD, GSD, ADR/decision artifacts, source code, tests, runtime proof, and real-document evidence.

layers.name: Legal source structuring
layers.description: Consultant XML/source structuring and parser-related proof artifacts.

layers.name: Architecture registry JSONL
layers.description: Generated architecture item and edge projections used for graph checks and generated views.

layers.name: Architecture verifier
layers.description: Checks registry freshness, graph integrity, source anchors, decision fitness, and claim-safety boundaries.

layers.name: Architecture Control Plane
layers.description: Reusable architecture-governance layer for prompt records, proposals, decision candidates, proof gates, health findings, allowed/blocked actions, and recovery views.

layers.name: RDF/SHACL/SPARQL projection
layers.description: Custom-only ACP projection for diagnostics, recovery, and interoperability; not RDF engine proof, SHACL engine proof, or SPARQL execution proof.

layers.name: Project state documentation pack
layers.description: Markdown, JSON, and Mermaid summaries for cold-reader orientation.

flows.relationship: ACP governance rows included in default registry

source_of_truth_boundary.rule: Derived layers diagnose, summarize, or project architecture state; they do not replace source evidence.
